phrases.english: Past is past, let it go.

phrases.indonesian: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.
phrases.transliteration: Belajar Bahasa Indonesia, bicara percaya diri.

phrases.english: Discover new cultures, connect with people.
phrases.indonesian: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.
phrases.transliteration: Temukan budaya baru, terhubung dengan orang.

phrases.english: Understand the language, feel the spirit.
Learn a little, grow a lot.
Embrace the challenge, you will win.

phrases.indonesian: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.
phrases.transliteration: Dengar lebih banyak, bicara lebih baik.

phrases.english: Good things, come to those who wait.
phrases.indonesian: Hal baik, datang pada yang sabar.
phrases.transliteration: Hal baiik, daatang pada yang sabar.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.

phrases.indonesian: Pikir di luar, bangun di dalam.
phrases.transliteration: Pi-kir di lu-ar, ba-ngun di da-lam.

phrases.english: You're a true friend, always there.
I miss our talks, a lot.
I want to buy this one.
Read Indonesian books, expand your mind.
Make Indonesian friends, share your story.
Embrace the challenge, achieve your goals.
Enjoy the journey, reach your goal.
A little more, and we're there.
Enjoy the journey, not just the end.
Don't fear mistakes, learn from them.
I want to go, to the beach.
Believe in yourself, you can do it.
A kind heart, shines so bright.

phrases.indonesian: Sebarkan kasih sayang, bagai mentari hangat.
phrases.transliteration: seb-ar-kan ka-sih sa-yang, ba-gai men-ta-ri ha-ngat.

phrases.english: A cat naps, on a warm mat.
phrases.indonesian: Kucing tidur, di atas tikar hangat.
phrases.transliteration: Koo-ching tee-door, dee ah-tahs tee-kar hahng-gaht.

phrases.english: The dog barks, at the passing car.
Birds sing, in the morning light.
A fish swims, in the clear water.
Monkeys chatter, high in the trees.
Indonesia, land of spices, always welcoming.
Taste the flavors, feel the warmth.
Rice fields shimmer, a beautiful scene.
This food, is bad. Stomach pain.
phrases.indonesian: Makanan ini, tidak baik. Sakit perut.
phrases.transliteration: Mak-an-an i-ni, ti-dak baik. Sak-it pe-rut.

phrases.english: My child, is missing. Please help.
Score a goal, win the game.
The slate is wiped clean, yes?
phrases.indonesian: Papan tulis kita, bersih lagi ya?
phrases.transliteration: Pa-pan tu-lis ki-ta, ber-sih la-gi ya?

phrases.english: Love, like a garden, needs care.
A breath, a pause, a sway.

phrases.indonesian: Rasa ingin tahu menggerakkan belajar, selalu.
phrases.transliteration: Rasa ingin tahu menggerakkan belajar, selalu.

phrases.english: Dare to dream, make it real.
Your head, is full of ideas.
Open your ears, fill your mind.
A quiet word, a loud lesson.
Listen to the silence, hear wisdom.
One new word, a new world.
Unlock your voice, day by day.
A new word, a new world.
My heart, is full, because of you.
I’m really, touched, by your thought.
Unlock Indonesia's heart, with every word.
phrases.indonesian: Buka hati Indonesia, dengan setiap kata.
phrases.transliteration: Bu-ka ha-ti In-do-ne-si-a, de-ngan se-ti-ap ka-ta.

phrases.english: Beyond the phrasebook, find your voice.
phrases.indonesian: Lebih dari buku frasa, temukan suaramu.
phrases.transliteration: Le-bih da-ri bu-ku fra-sa, te-mu-kan su-a-ra-mu.

phrases.english: Taste the language, savor the meaning.
Build bridges, one conversation at a time.
Offer hope, to a weary soul.
Be a calm presence, in chaos.
My phone, it's dead. Can you help?
Is this medication, safe to take?
I think I swallowed, something wrong.
My wallet, vanished. What to do?
The lion roars, a mighty sound.
A giraffe stretches, to reach leaves.
Penguins waddle, in a funny way.
Play with heart, give your all.

phrases.indonesian: Diam di dalam, damai di luar.
phrases.transliteration: Di-am di da-lam, da-mai di lu-ar.

phrases.english: Like a tall tree, grow strong.
The earth, holds you. Trust it.
You're the melody, in my life's song.
My world, feels complete with you.
Just seeing you, is a joy.
You're the calm, in my storm.
Your voice, finds its Indonesian echo.
Explore new words, every single day.
Sharing laughter, with you, is best.
Through thick, and thin, you're there.

phrases.indonesian: Hujan deras tiba-tiba, membuat kami kaget.
phrases.transliteration: Hoo-jan deh-rahs tee-bah tee-bah, mem-boo-at kah-mee kah-get.

phrases.indonesian: Apa menu spesial hari ini, koki?
phrases.transliteration: A-pa me-nu spe-si-al ha-ri i-ni, ko-ki?

phrases.english: A little bit of spice, please.
This item, looks lovely. May I ask, its price?
phrases.indonesian: Barang ini, terlihat bagus. Boleh tanya, harganya berapa?
phrases.transliteration: Barang ini, terlihat bagus. Boleh tanya, harganya berapa?

phrases.english: I'm looking for, something special. Do you have, any recommendations?
phrases.indonesian: Saya cari, sesuatu yang istimewa. Ada rekomendasi, Pak/Bu?
phrases.transliteration: Saya cari, sesuatu yang istimewa. Ada rekomendasi, Pak/Bu?

phrases.english: This pattern, is very unique. Is it, locally made?
phrases.indonesian: Corak ini, sangat unik. Ini buatan, lokal ya?
phrases.transliteration: Corak ini, sangat unik. Ini buatan, lokal ya?

phrases.english: Could you show me, more options please?
My heart sings, a gentle melody.
A quiet joy, fills my soul.
Feeling a bit restless, like a breeze.
Lost in thought, a distant gaze.
A spark of curiosity, ignites within.
phrases.indonesian: Percikan rasa ingin tahu, menyala di hati.
phrases.transliteration: Per-ci-kan ra-sa i-ngin ta-hu, me-nya-la di ha-ti.

phrases.english: Spark an idea, watch it grow.
What if..., then make it real.
Connect the dots, make new things.
Play with concepts, find your flow.
Dream a little, build a lot.
A tiny mouse, scurries quickly, home.
The owl watches, with big eyes, at night.
phrases.indonesian: Burung hantu mengawasi, mata besar, malam.
phrases.transliteration: Boo-roong hahn-too meng-ah-wah-see, mah-tah beh-sar, mah-lahm.

phrases.english: A rabbit hops, through the green grass.
The bee buzzes, collecting sweet nectar.

phrases.transliteration: Oo-lahr meh-rah-yahp, dee-ahm dee-ahm, tahk ter-lee-haht.

phrases.english: A silent nod, says it all.
Open your heart, absorb the sounds.
Breathe the language, live the words.
Unfold your understanding, bit by bit.
A warm thought, shared with joy.
Offer grace, when things are tough.
Let kindness flow, like gentle rain.
phrases.indonesian: Biarkan kebaikan mengalir, bagai hujan lembut.
phrases.transliteration: Bee-ar-kan keh-bah-ee-kan meng-ah-leer, bah-guy hoo-jan lum-boot.

phrases.english: A little care, makes a big difference.
Dawn's soft light, a fresh start.
Focus on the goal, stay motivated.
This city, has so much soul.
My taste buds, are dancing happily.
Can we linger, a little longer?
This is, a memory in the making.
Find your rhythm, flow with the game.
Grit and determination, key to success.
The ball is live, anticipation builds.
Open your ears, absorb the sounds.
Dare to speak, find your rhythm.
Explore the culture, embrace the language.
Listen to your heart, it knows.
Your presence, a gift, for me.
We click, so well, don't we?
Sharing moments, with you, is great.
Open a book, open your mind.
Don't force it, let it flow.
Grow your world, word by word.
Taste the culture, with your tongue.
A pleasure to meet you, truly.
My favorite sweater, is worn out.
These socks, have holes in them.
I need to mend, my shorts.
phrases.indonesian: Saya perlu perbaiki, celana pendek saya.
phrases.transliteration: sa-yah per-loo per-bah-ee, cel-ah-nah pen-dek sa-yah.

phrases.english: Embrace each moment, find your power.
Find your voice, speak your truth.
A word of peace, calms storms.
Be a soft landing, for falls.
Ease in, breathe out. Soft hold.
Open the curtains, let light in.
Sip my coffee, warm my hands.
